title: Diagnose an ANR
description: Locate the main-thread block behind an Application Not Responding event and move the work off the UI thread.
body: Steps: 1. Collect the ANR trace (Play vitals / adb) and read the main thread's stack at the time of the block. 2. Identify the blocking call: synchronous network, disk/database, large bitmap decode, or a lock contended by the UI thread. 3. Enable StrictMode in debug to catch main-thread disk/network proactively. 4. Move the work into a coroutine on Dispatchers.IO/Default and post results back to the main dispatcher. 5. Re-test under slow-network/large-data conditions. Rollback point: before introducing concurrency around shared state (race risk). Validation: no ANR under stress and StrictMode shows a clean main thread; fixing the symptom by widening the ANR timeout instead of unblocking the thread leaves the freeze in place.
